who: procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 vendor deliveries/week
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10-20 vendor deliveries/week, inconsistent vendor delivery performance causes late orders. We provide performance monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent vendor delivery performance leading to late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for sharing tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly performance alerts and Dashboard for vendor metrics on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
